name: Glucomannan
summary: Decision-ready summary: Glucomannan is best framed for satiety; LDL cholesterol support; constipation support; safety screen: swallowing difficulty; bowel obstruction; medication timing conflicts.
description: Glucomannan supports satiety; fiber; cholesterol with moderate-high confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v10.3: Glucomannan evidence for weight loss is mixed; strongest consumer value is fiber/satiety with strict water/choking cautions.
claimMap.notes: v10.3: Glucomannan evidence for weight loss is mixed; strongest consumer value is fiber/satiety with strict water/choking cautions.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: About 2–4 g/day split before meals with plenty of water; follow product-specific instructions

claimMap.claim: Use cautious, source-specific language; do not generalize beyond the cited population/preparation.
claimMap.notes: Use cautious, source-specific language; do not generalize beyond the cited population/preparation.

sources.title: The efficacy of glucomannan supplementation in overweight and obesity: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized clinical trials.
sources.citation: Author not retrieved (2014). J Am Coll Nutr. PMID: 24533610. DOI: 10.1080/07315724.2014.870013.
sources.note: source-backed gap-fill audit only; not a full monograph field extraction
